hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'execution-log\.json' && { echo "$INPUT" | PYTHONPATH=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts python3 -m des.adapters.drivers.hooks.claude_code_hook_adapter pre-write; exit $?; }; test -f .nwave/des/deliver-session.json || exit 0; echo "$INPUT" | PYTHONPATH=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts python3 -m des.adapters.drivers.hooks.claude_code_hook_adapter pre-write

INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'execution-log\.json' && { echo "$INPUT" | PYTHONPATH=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts python3 -m des.adapters.drivers.hooks.claude_code_hook_adapter pre-edit; exit $?; }; test -f .nwave/des/deliver-session.json || exit 0; echo "$INPUT" | PYTHONPATH=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts python3 -m des.adapters.drivers.hooks.claude_code_hook_adapter pre-edit
